name: 0xkevin (🖤 , 💙)
fullText:
AI 的意义大概就是让已逝的人还能继续发光发热

和这个ai对话仿佛张老师还在世，继续帮助更多普通家庭少走弯路

还有两个月高考，祝各位考生金榜题名

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Russia & Ukraine accuse each other of violating the Orthodox Easter ceasefire.

name: PuffyBull
fullText:
Everyone’s a genius in a bull market.

Until it crashes.

Then they disappear,

No tweets. No advice. No help.

The truth is, you need to learn now,

In the boring times. In the blood.

Because when things fly again,

It’s already too late to learn.

Wanna make it?

Master

fullText:
